title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following ways of strengthening democracy and civic engagement, then decide which two are most important.
options: Making voting compulsory for all eligible citizens
Lowering the voting age to sixteen
Making it easier to vote through digital and postal voting
Holding politicians more accountable through independent oversight

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to democracy and civic engagement. Discuss the following ways of strengthening democracy and civic engagement, then decide which two are most important. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two are most important.
